title: Serve GCS with uniform bucket-level access and signed URLs
description: Enable uniform bucket-level access to disable per-object ACLs, control reads through IAM, and share privately via signed URLs or Cloud CDN.
body: Use when configuring a Cloud Storage bucket or sharing objects. Do not rely on legacy per-object ACLs or grant allUsers to share a single file. Actions: enable uniform bucket-level access so IAM alone governs reads, keep public access prevention on, generate V4 signed URLs for time-limited private sharing, and front public static assets with Cloud CDN backed by the bucket. Validation signals include the bucket showing uniform access enabled, public access prevention enforced, and a signed URL expiring as configured. Risk boundary: granting allUsers/allAuthenticatedUsers or disabling public access prevention is human-gated.
